report_name: Trigona Ransomware Evolves, Using Custom Exfiltration Tool for Stealthier Data Theft

threat_actors.name: Rhantus
threat_actors.description: A cybercrime group attributed to the Trigona ransomware operation. Affiliates of this group are deploying a custom data exfiltration tool named 'uploader_client.exe' to enhance their double-extortion attacks.
threat_actors.goals: Financial extortion through ransomware and data theft.

attack_patterns.name: Develop Capabilities
attack_patterns.description: The Rhantus group developed a custom data exfiltration tool, 'uploader_client.exe', to replace generic utilities like Rclone, thereby lowering detection rates.

attack_patterns.name: Exfiltration Over C2 Channel
attack_patterns.description: The custom tool 'uploader_client.exe' uses multi-threading with five parallel connections per file to exfiltrate large volumes of data to an attacker-controlled server, saturating the victim's outbound bandwidth.

attack_patterns.name: Application Layer Protocol
attack_patterns.description: The exfiltration tool rotates TCP connections after a set volume of data is transferred to evade network monitoring systems that alert on long-lived, high-volume flows.

attack_patterns.name: Automated Collection
attack_patterns.description: The 'uploader_client.exe' tool uses an '--exclude-ext' flag to filter out low-value files (e.g., .mp3, .mp4) and focus the collection on specific high-value document types like PDFs and financial records.

attack_patterns.name: Data Encrypted for Impact
attack_patterns.description: Trigona is a ransomware operation that encrypts victim data as part of its double-extortion attack model.

malware.name: Trigona
malware.description: A Ransomware-as-a-Service (RaaS) operation active since late 2022, associated with the Rhantus cybercrime group. It performs double-extortion attacks by first stealing data and then encrypting it.

malware.name: uploader_client.exe
malware.description: A custom-built command-line data exfiltration tool used by Trigona ransomware affiliates. It is designed for speed and stealth, featuring multi-threaded uploads, connection rotation, and file-type filtering.

tools.name: Rclone
tools.description: A common, legitimate command-line utility for managing files on cloud storage, which was previously used by Trigona affiliates for data exfiltration before they developed their custom tool.

tools.name: MegaSync
tools.description: A legitimate cloud storage synchronization tool mentioned as being previously used by Trigona affiliates for data exfiltration.

infrastructure.name: Trigona Exfiltration Server
infrastructure.description: A hardcoded, attacker-controlled server that the 'uploader_client.exe' tool communicates with for data exfiltration. The connection is authenticated with a shared key.

indicators.name: Trigona Custom Exfiltration Tool Filename
indicators.x_netsecio_sigma_rule:
title: Trigona Custom Exfiltration Tool Execution
id: 7b2a1c9e-8f0d-4b6e-8c4a-9d1e2f3a4b5c
status: experimental
description: Detects the execution of the Trigona ransomware's custom exfiltration tool 'uploader_client.exe'.
references:
  - https://www.security.com/archives/trigona-affiliates-deploy-custom-exfiltration-tool-to-streamline-data-theft/
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-04-27
tags:
  - attack.t1041
  - attack.exfiltration
level: high
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    Image|endswith: '\uploader_client.exe'
  condition: selection
indicators.description: Detects the execution of the custom data exfiltration tool 'uploader_client.exe' used by Trigona ransomware affiliates.

indicators.name: Suspicious File Exclusion in Command Line
indicators.pattern:
title: Suspicious File Exclusion Argument in Command Line
id: f8d9c0b1-a2e3-4f5a-b6c7-d8e9f0a1b2c3
status: experimental
description: Detects the use of '--exclude-ext' command-line argument, which is used by the Trigona ransomware's custom exfiltration tool to filter files during data theft. This pattern may also indicate other custom exfiltration or backup tools.
references:
  - https://www.security.com/archives/trigona-affiliates-deploy-custom-exfiltration-tool-to-streamline-data-theft/
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-04-27
tags:
  - attack.t1119
  - attack.collection
level: medium
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    CommandLine|contains: ' --exclude-ext '
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
  - Legitimate backup or synchronization tools that might use a similar flag.
indicators.description: Detects the use of the '--exclude-ext' command-line flag, a feature of the 'uploader_client.exe' tool used to filter files for exfiltration.

relationships.source_name: Suspicious File Exclusion in Command Line
Suspicious File Exclusion in Command Line
